message:
feat(core,server): request-scoped auth context, typed session state, and resource template validation

Move auth context from session state key-based lookup to a dedicated
Arc<Mutex<Option<AuthContext>>> field on McpContext, ensuring auth is
properly scoped per request and propagated through context builders.

Enhance SessionState with typed get/set/remove methods, iterator support,
improved Debug output, and Clone support for stored values.

Add resource template parameter extraction and validation in the router,
with better error messages for missing resources and improved routing for
parameterized resource URIs.

Refactor server to propagate auth through McpContext rather than session
state keys, add resource template parameter validation, and improve error
handling for tool/resource/prompt resolution with proper session cleanup.

Extensive test coverage for auth context propagation, session state typed
access, resource template routing, and parameter validation edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
